title: Thy Heart
content:
Make not of thy heart a casket,
    Opening seldom, quick to close;
    But of bread a wide-mouthed basket,
    Or a cup that overflows.
meaning:
"Thy Heart" is a quintessential example of George MacDonald's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
